title: Bound the blast radius of a refactor
description: Scope each refactor so its reach is known and reviewable, splitting wide-impact changes from behavior changes and from each other.
body: Use when a rename, signature change, or extraction touches many call sites. Do not mix a mechanical wide-reaching change with a behavioral change in one commit, and do not let scope expand mid-refactor. Actions: measure how many call sites and modules are affected, isolate the pure structural change into its own reviewable step, and keep any behavior change as a separate follow-up. Validation signals include a diff that is mechanical and a green test run between steps. Risk boundary: a wide structural change bundled with logic edits is hard to review and bisect; if the blast radius is large, stage it and get review before merging the next layer.
